entries.description: Required targeted regression tests and the full Go suite passed for the changed planning and worker parsing files. Requested domain planning-orchestration is not accepted by this runtime, so testing findings were persisted here.

Phase 6 verification passed: lifecycle worker activity contract, continue wrapper_contract source_command, build claim path validation, build provenance, and live loop evidence were verified with git diff --check, focused phase-6 lifecycle/provenance/claim tests, and go test ./cmd.
Branch/function coverage and mutation score were not available from inspected evidence. Mutation tooling was not installed in PATH, so mutation_score remains 0/unknown.
entries.suggestion: Resolve before sealing the colony, or rerun seal with --force only if the risk is intentionally accepted.

entries.description: Fresh coverage is 77.3% total statements, below the Probe target of 80% lines/statements. Seal should wait for either additional coverage on changed critical lifecycle paths or an explicit documented waiver from the Queen/runtime policy.
entries.suggestion: Resolve before sealing the colony, or rerun seal with --force only if the risk is intentionally accepted.

entries.description: Repository-wide Go statement coverage from the fresh seal probe run is 77.3%, below the Probe minimum target of 80%.
entries.suggestion: Add focused tests around low-coverage lifecycle-adjacent packages or document an explicit seal waiver for this threshold before sealing.

entries.description: Mutation testing could not run because no mutation testing command was installed.
entries.suggestion: Add focused coverage before expanding the sealed surface.

entries.description: No branch coverage evidence was available from Go test output.
entries.suggestion: Add focused coverage before expanding the sealed surface.

entries.description: No function coverage aggregate was computed beyond Go statement coverage.

entries.description: Phase 6 review.json only records that review workers were skipped by --skip-watchers; it does not itself contain detailed findings/evidence.

entries.description: Critical lifecycle regressions have focused tests for unsafe claim paths, stale/drifted manifests, missing task evidence, source_command drift, and skip-watchers verification failure behavior.
Treat package-wide coverage as advisory only unless a concrete changed reliability path lacks focused regression coverage.
Coverage numbers are intentionally omitted because the interrupted coverage-profile command did not produce reviewed evidence.
entries.suggestion: Add focused coverage before expanding the sealed surface.

entries.description: Review ledgers for phase 6 contain multiple open INFO entries with sparse descriptions; not blocking because verification artifacts and worker reports supplied concrete evidence.
entries.suggestion: Add focused coverage before expanding the sealed surface.
